Input Name: National Grid Carbon Intensity API - National
Description: Gets data for the current half hour, for Great Britain at a national level
Indexed Data "_time" field: The timestamp from the event in the API response

Input Name: National Grid Carbon Intensity API - Regional
Description: Gets data for the current half hour for all Great Britain regions
Indexed Data "_time" field: The timestamp from the event in the API response
Indexed Data "_raw" field: API response body, broken into 1 event per region
Indexed Data Volume: Approx total of 8766 bytes for 18 events, every call

Input Name: National Grid Carbon Intensity API - Post Code(s)
Description: Gets data for the current half hour for one or more Great Britain Post Codes
API Endpoint:
/regional/postcode/{post code}

1 call is made per postcode
Parameters: Comma delimited list of UK outward postcodes i.e. RG41 or SW1 or TF8.
Indexed Data "_time" field: The timestamp from the event in the API response
Event Count per call: 1 event per API call. If multiple post codes are supplied, multiple calls are made

Input Name: National Grid Carbon Intensity API - National Forecast
Description: Gets data for the next 48h, for Great Britain at a national level
Indexed Data "_time" field: The time the events are saved to Splunk

Input Name: National Grid Carbon Intensity API - Regional Forecast
Description: Gets data for the next 48h for all Great Britain regions
Indexed Data "_time" field: The time the events are saved to Splunk
Indexed Data "_raw" field: API response body, broken into 1 event per region
Indexed Data Volume:
Approx 717761 bytes per forecast covering all regions.

(39875 bytes per region)

Input Name: National Grid Carbon Intensity API - Post Code(s) Forecast
Description: Gets data for the next 48h for one or more Great Britain Post Codes
Parameters: Comma delimited list of UK outward postcodes i.e. RG41 or SW1 or TF8.
Indexed Data "_time" field: The time the events are saved to Splunk
Event Count per call: 1 event per API call. If multiple post codes are supplied, multiple calls are made

Input Name: National Grid Carbon Intensity API - National - Backfill
Description:
Gets historic data in half hour increments, for Great Britain at a national level.

Maximum duration of 14 days per call.
Parameters:
from and to times, in ISO8601 format YYYY-MM-DDThh:mmZ e.g. 2017-08-25T12:35Z

Note the time range is inclusive, so use 2023-07-15T00:00Z to 2023-07-15T23:59Z for 1 day.
Default request frequency:
One-off call.

Provide a large number for the call interval, then disable the input after a few minutes.
Indexed Data "_time" field: The timestamp from the event in the API response
Indexed Data "_raw" field:
API response body, broken into 1 event per time period

Structure should be the same as saved by the “National Grid Carbon Intensity API - National” input
Event Count per call: 1 per 30 minute period in date range supplied

Input Name: National Grid Carbon Intensity API - Regional - Backfill
Description:
Gets historic data in half hour increments, for all Great Britain regions.

Maximum duration of 14 days per call.
Parameters:
from and to times, in ISO8601 format YYYY-MM-DDThh:mmZ e.g. 2017-08-25T12:35Z

Note the time range is inclusive, so use 2023-07-15T00:00Z to 2023-07-15T23:59Z for 1 day.
Default request frequency:
One-off call.

Provide a large number for the call interval, then disable the input after a few minutes.
Indexed Data "_time" field: The timestamp from the event in the API response
Indexed Data "_raw" field:
API response body, broken into 1 event per time period, for each region

Structure should be the same as saved by the “National Grid Carbon Intensity API - Regional” input
Event Count per call: 18 per 30 minute period in date range supplied

Input Name: National Grid Carbon Intensity API - Post Code(s) - Backfill
Description:
Gets historic data in half hour increments, for one or more Great Britain Post Codes.

Maximum duration of 14 days per call.
Parameters:
Comma delimited list of UK outward postcodes i.e. RG41 or SW1 or TF8.

from and to times, in ISO8601 format YYYY-MM-DDThh:mmZ e.g. 2017-08-25T12:35Z

Note the time range is inclusive, so use 2023-07-15T00:00Z to 2023-07-15T23:59Z for 1 day.
Default request frequency:
One-off call.

Provide a large number for the call interval, then disable the input after a few minutes.
Indexed Data "_time" field: The timestamp from the event in the API response
Indexed Data "_raw" field:
API response body, broken into 1 event per time period

Structure should be the same as saved by the “National Grid Carbon Intensity API - Post Code(s)” input
Event Count per call: 1 per 30 minute period, per post code, in date range supplied

Description: Gets data for the current hour, for the specified zone(s)

Description: Gets data for the next 48h for the specified zone
Indexed Data "_time" field: The time the events are saved to Splunk

Description: Time range is limited to 10 days
Default request frequency:
One-off call.

Provide a large number for the call interval, then disable the input after a few minutes.

API response body, broken into 1 event per time period
